registers.name: ETHERNET_MAC

variants.name: Disabled
variants.description: MAC passes all incoming frames unmodified

variants.name: Strip
variants.description: MAC strips the Pad/FCS field on incoming frames only for lengths less than or equal to 1500 bytes

variants.name: Enabled
variants.description: Address filters pass all received broadcast frames

variants.name: Disabled
variants.description: Address filters filter all incoming broadcast frames

variants.name: BL10
variants.description: For retransmission n, wait up to 2^min(n, 10) time slots

variants.name: BL8
variants.description: For retransmission n, wait up to 2^min(n, 8) time slots

variants.name: BL4
variants.description: For retransmission n, wait up to 2^min(n, 4) time slots

variants.name: BL1
variants.description: For retransmission n, wait up to 2^min(n, 1) time slots

variants.name: Enabled
variants.description: Errors generated due to loss of carrier

variants.name: Disabled
variants.description: No error generated due to loss of carrier

variants.name: Rollover
variants.description: Counters roll over to zero after reaching the maximum value

variants.name: NotRollover
variants.description: Counters do not roll over to zero after reaching the maximum value

variants.name: RoundRobin
variants.description: Round-robin with Rx:Tx priority given by PM

variants.name: Invert
variants.description: Address check block operates in inverse filtering mode for the DA address comparison

variants.name: Stopped
variants.description: Reception is stopped after transfer of the current frame

variants.name: Started
variants.description: Reception is placed in the Running state

variants.name: Enabled
variants.description: Drop frames with errors only in the receive checksum offload engine

variants.name: Disabled
variants.description: Do not drop frames that only have errors in the receive checksum offload engine

variants.name: Variable
variants.description: AHB uses SINGLE and INCR burst transfers

variants.name: Fixed
variants.description: AHB uses only fixed burst transfers

variants.name: DisableBackPressure
variants.description: In half duplex only, deasserts back pressure

variants.name: PauseOrBackPressure
variants.description: In full duplex, initiate a Pause control frame. In half duplex, assert back pressure

variants.name: Drop
variants.description: Rx FIFO drops frames with error status

variants.name: Forward
variants.description: All frames except runt error frames are forwarded to the DMA

variants.name: Flush
variants.description: Transmit FIFO controller logic is reset to its default values. Cleared automatically

variants.name: Drop
variants.description: Rx FIFO drops all frames of less than 64 bytes

variants.name: Perfect
variants.description: MAC performs a perfect destination address filtering for multicast frames

variants.name: Hash
variants.description: MAC performs destination address filtering of received multicast frames according to the hash table

variants.name: HashOnly
variants.description: If HM or HU is set, only frames that match the Hash filter are passed

variants.name: HashOrPerfect
variants.description: If HM or HU is set, frames that match either the perfect filter or the hash filter are passed

variants.name: Perfect
variants.description: MAC performs a perfect destination address filtering for unicast frames

variants.name: Hash
variants.description: MAC performs destination address filtering of received unicast frames according to the hash table

variants.name: Offload
variants.description: IPv4 checksums are checked in received frames

variants.name: Enabled
variants.description: Jabber enabled, transmit frames up to 2048 bytes

variants.name: Disabled
variants.description: Jabber disabled, transmit frames up to 16384 bytes

variants.name: Loopback
variants.description: MAC operates in loopback mode at the MII

variants.name: Destination
variants.description: This address is used for comparison with DA fields of the received frame

variants.name: Source
variants.description: This address is used for comparison with SA fields of received frames

variants.name: Normal
variants.description: Fixed burst transfers (INCRx and SINGLE) for burst lengths of 16 and below

variants.name: Mixed
variants.description: If FB is low, start all bursts greater than 16 with INCR (undefined burst)

variants.name: Busy
variants.description: This bit is set to 1 by the application to indicate that a read or write access is in progress

variants.name: AlmostHalf
variants.description: When MCP is set, MMC counters are preset to almost-half value 0x7FFF_FFF0

variants.name: AlmostFull
variants.description: When MCP is set, MMC counters are preset to almost-full value 0xFFFF_FFF0

variants.name: Preset
variants.description: MMC counters will be preset to almost full or almost half. Cleared automatically

variants.name: PBL1
variants.description: Maximum of 1 beat per DMA transaction

variants.name: PBL2
variants.description: Maximum of 2 beats per DMA transaction

variants.name: PBL4
variants.description: Maximum of 4 beats per DMA transaction

variants.name: PBL8
variants.description: Maximum of 8 beats per DMA transaction

variants.name: PBL16
variants.description: Maximum of 16 beats per DMA transaction

variants.name: PBL32
variants.description: Maximum of 32 beats per DMA transaction

variants.name: PreventAll
variants.description: MAC prevents all control frames from reaching the application

variants.name: ForwardAllExceptPause
variants.description: MAC forwards all control frames to application except Pause

variants.name: ForwardAll
variants.description: MAC forwards all control frames to application even if they fail the address filter

variants.name: ForwardAllFiltered
variants.description: MAC forwards control frames that pass the address filter

variants.name: Enabled
variants.description: All received frames will be dropped. Cleared automatically when a magic packet or wakeup frame is received

variants.name: Enabled
variants.description: MAC attempts retries based on the settings of BL

variants.name: Enabled
variants.description: MAC receives all packets from PHY while transmitting

variants.name: Disabled
variants.description: MAC disables reception of frames in half-duplex mode

variants.name: Stopped
variants.description: Stopped, reset or Stop Receive command issued

variants.name: RunningWriting
variants.description: Running, writing data to host memory buffer

variants.name: CutThrough
variants.description: Rx FIFO operates in cut-through mode, subject to RTC bits

variants.name: StoreForward
variants.description: Frames are read from Rx FIFO after complete frame has been written

variants.name: Stopped
variants.description: Transmission is placed in the Stopped state

variants.name: Started
variants.description: Transmission is placed in Running state

variants.name: Stopped
variants.description: Stopped, Reset or Stop Transmit command issued

variants.name: RunningReading
variants.description: Running, reading data from host memory buffer

variants.name: Suspended
variants.description: Suspended, transmit descriptor unavailable or transmit buffer underflow

variants.name: CutThrough
variants.description: Transmission starts when the frame size in the Tx FIFO exceeds TTC threshold

variants.name: StoreForward
variants.description: Transmission starts when a full frame is in the Tx FIFO

variants.name: Combined
variants.description: PBL value used for both Rx and Tx DMA

variants.name: Separate
variants.description: RxDMA uses RDP value, TxDMA uses PBL value

variants.name: VLANTC16
variants.description: Full 16 bit VLAN identifiers are used for comparison and filtering

variants.name: VLANTC12
variants.description: 12 bit VLAN identifies are used for comparison and filtering

variants.name: Enabled
variants.description: Watchdog enabled, receive frames limited to 2048 bytes

variants.name: Disabled
variants.description: Watchdog disabled, receive frames may be up to to 16384 bytes

variants.name: Reset
variants.description: Reset wakeup frame filter register point to 0b000. Automatically cleared

variants.name: Enabled
variants.description: Normal operation with automatic zero-quanta pause control frame generation

variants.name: Disabled
variants.description: Automatic generation of zero-quanta pause control frames is disabled
